name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Changing of User Agent
notes: This building block detects a suspicious changing of user agent. Adversaries may communicate using application layer protocols associated with web traffic to avoid detection/network filtering by blending in with existing traffic.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Changing of User Agent on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Curl
BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Powershell
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Curl, BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Powershell
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Changing of User Agent on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Curl, BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Powershell
